The question is asking to determine which ferry was delivered directly after Princess Teguise. Since "original name" column contains the names of the ferries and "delivery" column contains date strings describing the delivery dates, we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(delivery) operation with the order "small to large" (chronological order) to see the delivery sequence and identify the ferry delivered right after Princess Teguise.
The ferry "Princess Teguise" was delivered in June 1991. The next ferry delivered after it was "Toppy 2" in April 1992. Therefore, the ferry delivered directly after Princess Teguise was Toppy 2.
